text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City has been training hard every day for
our next goal race, the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...
choice_data_list: Good work. Let's take a break!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Already?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I can keep going. Why are you being so easy on
me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Push me harder. I have to be so much better than
I am now!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I am patient.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm going to cool down! I'll be back soon!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What am I, a little kid throwing a tantrum?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What're ya doin' wanderin' onto the track?
Don'tcha know that's a hazard?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sorry! I must've spaced out.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dang it, well be careful!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Guess I should go back.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Raaaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Tch, I'm not gettin' faster at all. Again!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What insane energy...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Um... Tamamo! Can I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since City ran off. I decide to
check on her.

text_block_list.name: City and Tamamo
text_block_list.text:
Haaaaahh!
Raaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City is having an intense pair running
session with Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Woo! Dat's what I'm talkin' about!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Damn it, I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ey, but ya did good. Nothin' like having a rival to
get ya fired up!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you can go for more. How about
another lap?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh... So you ran away durin' your break and
wandered over here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: No wonder your trainer looks like a sad puppy.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's not that I don't respect what my trainer says...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I can't afford to take a break. I have to push
my limits and get faster!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Well, can't say I don't know how ya feel.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But that's no reason to skip out on breaks. For
such a pretty face, you're really bullheaded.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What does being pretty have to do with
anything?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: My bad.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We all got things we don't wanna be told, even if
they're compliments.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
People used to make funna me, callin' me short all
the time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't matter here. I'm sorry if I made
ya feel bad.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm... sorry for overreacting.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I know you actually care more about how I run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Sorry for bothering you. But if it's all right
with you, maybe we could—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, City. Can I ask ya one thing?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why do ya run?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: To make people accept who I am... to show them who I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Flames burn in City's icy blue eyes. Tamamo Cross
responds...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Go get 'em! I knew there was somethin'
special about you!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: See, the reason I run is to win. I gotta win to help out my family, and nobody can stand in my way!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But no one's recognized me yet. I gotta let
everyone know I'm here, just like you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two look at each other silently with measured
smiles.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'mma head on back. You take a little
breather though, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo! Are you going to compete in the
Classics?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I want to race against you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I debuted pretty late, ya know? I'm still... adjustin'
to things.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Tell ya this, though, if we do meet on the track,
I'm gonna beat ya for real. Be prepared!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's my line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling Gold City's interaction with
Tamamo Cross today will contribute to her
growth.
